allow: Bash(Rscript -e "library\(wooldridge\); data\(jtrain\); j88 <- subset\(jtrain, year==88\); cat\('n=', nrow\(na.omit\(j88[,c\('clscrap','chrsemp','cgrant'\)]\)\), '\\n'\); cat\(head\(j88[,c\('clscrap','chrsemp','cgrant'\)]\), '\\n'\)")

Bash(Rscript -e "library\(wooldridge\); data\(jtrain\); j88 <- subset\(jtrain, year==88\); print\(summary\(j88[,c\('clscrap','chrsemp','cgrant'\)]\)\); cat\('n nonNA=', sum\(complete.cases\(j88[,c\('clscrap','chrsemp','cgrant'\)]\)\), '\\n'\)")
